top_signals.title: Post-War Gulf Faces Push for Alternative Export Routes
top_signals.summary: Middle East oil producers face a reckoning. The Iran war exposed the dangers of relying on a single chokepoint for vital oil and gas exports, leaving Gulf governments with a clear strategic imperative: diversify – at all costs.An Iranian blockade…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: ‘Bitcoin Rodney’ pleads guilty in $1.8 billion crypto fraud case
top_signals.summary: Rodney Burton pleaded guilty in federal court over his role in HyperFund, a $1.8 billion global cryptocurrency fraud scheme.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: What brings Modi and Netanyahu together
top_signals.summary: As Israel’s isolation deepens, ties with New Delhi are growing — from drones to statues
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Hamptons Golf Tickets At $400 Look Like A Steal After the Knicks
top_signals.summary: With Knicks NBA Finals seats and World Cup tickets costing thousands, golf's US Open in the Hamptons is emerging as a rare bargain. Paulina Cachero breaks down the numbers (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: CME CEO Terrence Duffy says the exchange operator will sue CFTC over perpetual futures
top_signals.summary: Outgoing CME CEO Terrence Duffy said that the exchange operator will sue the CFTC over the agency’s decision to approve perpetual futures.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: EQT Buys UK’s Intertek for £9.3 Billion in Latest LSE Exit
top_signals.summary: Intertek Group Plc agreed to a £9.3 billion ($12.3 billion) takeover bid from private equity firm EQT AB, a deal that will mean another British company leaves the London stock market.

top_signals.title: Intel surges 9% after Trump says company will partner with Apple on U.S. chip design
top_signals.summary: The boost continues Intel's recent rally as the chipmaker bounces back from years of headwinds.
